title: Physics-guided Convolutional Neural Network for Domain Growth Prediction in Systems with Conserved Kinetics
summary:
Title: Physics-Guided Convolutional Neural Network for Domain Growth Prediction in Systems with Conserved Kinetics

Abstract:
In the realm of materials science and condensed matter physics, predicting the growth patterns of domains in systems with conserved kinetics is crucial for understanding phase transformations and material properties. Traditional predictive models often fall short in capturing the complex interplay between physical laws and empirical data. This study introduces a novel Physics-Guided Convolutional Neural Network (PG-CNN) framework that integrates physical principles

title: Talos: Scaling rare disease diagnosis with automated, iterative genomic reanalysis
summary:
"Talos: Scaling Rare Disease Diagnosis with Automated, Iterative Genomic Reanalysis" - A Novel Approach to Precision Medicine

Abstract:
The diagnosis of rare diseases often presents a significant challenge due to their low prevalence and the complexity of their genetic underpinnings. Traditional diagnostic methods are time-consuming and require extensive expertise, which can delay treatment and negatively impact patient outcomes. To address this issue, we introduce Talos, an innovative system designed to automate and scale the diagnostic process for rare diseases through iterative
